description: Double the grid in both dimensions while preserving foreground color. Fill a derived background/checker pattern with azure around the scaled structure. Confidence is medium because azure placement is local-context dependent.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_10fcaaa3(I):
    x1 = leastcolor(I)
    x2 = hconcat(I, I)
    x3 = vconcat(x2, x2)
    x4 = ofcolor(x3, x1)
    x5 = mapply(ineighbors, x4)
    O = underfill(x3, EIGHT, x5)
    return O
